Create a new jj commit (or describe the working copy) with the description `Add feature.txt`.\\n\\nWhen finished, the repository should be a valid colocated jj/Git repo, the `feature-x` bookmark should exist and be exported to Git, and the commit should have the specified description and file."}]}
